news.headline: FNMA = +43% = +60% FANNIE, FREDDIE OTC SHARES SOAR AFTER TRUMP COMMENTS ON SPIN-OFF

news.summary: Intuit Inc. will unveil its third-quarter financial results on Thursday, May 22, after the market closes. Analysts predict the California-based company to post quarterly earnings of $10.91 per share, an increase from $9.88 per share in the same period last year. Intuit anticipates quarterly revenue to reach $7.56 billion, up from $6.74 billion a year prior. UBS analyst Taylor McGinnis recently affirmed Intuit with a Neutral rating and raised the price target from $655 to $720 on May 16. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 0.63%, with a quarterly dividend of $1.04 per share ($4.16 annually). Investors may be considering potential gains from dividends amid the growing interest in Intuit.
news.headline: Intuit (INTU) to report Q3 earnings on May 22, expecting $7.56B in revenue, $10.91 per share. Dividend yield of 0.63%.

news.summary: ATB Financial reported strong financial results for fiscal year 2025, with record total revenue of $2.2 billion, marking an 8.0% increase from the previous year. The loan portfolio exceeded $54.3 billion, driving the growth alongside a 17.5% increase in other income. ATB Wealth achieved record-high assets under administration of $37.2 billion, including the acquisition of BCV Asset Management Inc. The bank helped more than 20,000 Albertans achieve home ownership goals with a record new residential mortgage loan origination of $4.4 billion, up 42% YoY. Non-interest expenses also rose by 11% due to technology investments. Net income increased to $347.6 million.
news.headline: ATB Financial boasts record revenue of $2.2 billion for fiscal year 2025, with loan portfolio exceeding $54.3 billion. CEO attributes growth to business diversity and strategic acquisitions.

news.summary: A recent collaboration in Washington is set to expedite the digital transformation of government systems by implementing end-to-end accreditation automation. This partnership will significantly enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of government processes.
news.headline: Kovr.ai and Second Front Systems join forces to automate government software accreditation, speeding up digital transformation.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Sinclair Oil unveiled its second annual DINO Days event, in celebration of National Dinosaur Day. The event, running from June 1-3, 2025, is part of the HF Sinclair brand (NYSE: DINO). Following the triumph of the previous year's DINO Day, Sinclair has extended the promotion from one day to three. DINO Days will introduce trivia and selfie contests, with prizes including $250 Sinclair gift cards for one winner in each sweepstake, along with additional perks.
news.headline: Sinclair Oil expands DINO Days promotion for National Dinosaur Day with trivia and sweepstakes, offering $250 gift card to winners.
United Maritime announces Q1 2025 financial results, with $0.01/share cash dividend declared.

news.summary: In Winter Park, Florida, on May 22, 2025, SRM Entertainment, Inc. (Nasdaq: SRM), a prominent provider of licensed media-themed merchandise, shared news of a significant development. The Company has finalized a securities purchase agreement with an institutional investor for a private investment in public equity ("PIPE") financing. This transaction is anticipated to bring in roughly $5 million in gross proceeds for SRM. This estimate is calculated before factoring in placement agent fees and offering expenses.
news.headline: SRM Entertainment secures $5M investment in PIPE financing from institutional investor for growth.

news.summary: This announcement reveals that BON has introduced a new line of digestive health products called Tea Pigment, along with a cooperation agreement being forged with Shanghai Risesun International Trade. The partnership will likely involve a significant collaboration aimed at market expansion. The introduction of Tea Pigment products signifies BON's strategic move into the digestive health sector. This news demonstrates the company's commitment to diversification, with potential advantages for both parties. It will be interesting to observe how this collaboration unfolds and the impact it has on the market.
news.headline: BON launches Tea Pigment Digestive Health Products; signs deal with Shanghai Risesun.

news.summary: Houston-based company Freight Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: FRGT) disclosed a significant development on May 22, 2025, wherein the board of directors sanctioned a one for four reverse share split of its ordinary shares. This reverse split implies that for every four existing ordinary shares, one new share will be issued, thereby consolidating the total number of shares. Consequently, this move will result in a higher share price after the split, with trading on the adjusted basis officially commencing on May 27, 2025. This decision reflects Fr8Tech's commitment to optimizing its capital structure and upholding its market position.
news.headline: Freight Technologies undergoes 1-for-4 reverse share split on May 27, 2025 (Nasdaq: FRGT) to streamline issued shares.

news.summary: In Dalian, China, on May 22, 2025, CBAK Energy Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: CBAT), a prominent lithium-ion battery producer and electric energy solutions provider in China, disclosed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a share buyback initiative. This program permits the acquisition of up to $20 million worth of shares of its common stock.
news.headline: CBAK Energy's Board authorizes $20 million buyback program for common stock in next year.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 22, 2025, EnWave Corporation (TSX-V:ENW | FSE:E4U) shared their consolidated interim financial results for the second quarter ending on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: EnWave reports Q2 financial results for 2025, ended March 31. Stock: TSX-V:ENW | FSE:E4U. Vancouver-based.

news.summary: A report released today reveals that the global economy is projected to shrink by 4.4% in 2020, the worst peacetime downturn since the Great Depression. The report warns that a sluggish rebound is expected in 2021, with a predicted growth rate of 5.2%, significantly lower than pre-pandemic estimates. This downturn has resulted in an estimated 150 million people falling into extreme poverty, marking the first increase in global poverty since 1998. Additionally, global trade is predicted to decline by 11.9% this year, with oil prices plunging by 35%, and foreign direct investment projected to decrease by 40%. The report emphasizes the urgent need for coordinated policy responses to prevent further economic devastation.
news.headline: Akari Therapeutics scheduled to speak at virtual biotech investment webinar LIVE! with Webull Corporate Connect.

news.summary: Vancouver-based company Walker River Resources Corp. has started its 2025 reverse circulation drill program at the Lapon Canyon section of the Lapon Gold Project. The project is situated within the Walker Lane Gold trend, positioned 60 km southeast of Yerington, NV. The company, listed under TSX-V as WRR, commenced the drilling process at this location.
news.headline: Walker River Resources Corp starts 2025 RC drill program at Lapon Canyon in Nevada, part of Lapon Gold Project.

news.summary: In LAVAL, Quebec on May 22, 2025, Savaria Corporation, a prominent player in the accessibility sector, announced a dividend of 4.5 cents ($0.045) per common share. This aligns with their monthly dividend practice and will be distributed on June 9, 2025, to shareholders on record as of May 30, 2025. The company specified this as a qualifying dividend per the Income Tax Act regulations.
news.headline: Savaria (TSX: SIS) declares monthly dividend of 4.5 cents ($0.045) per share, payable June 9, 2025.

news.summary: Incorporating generative AI directly into the Nexxen Data Platform enhances machine learning capabilities for automating and optimizing campaign strategies. This integration will significantly improve the efficiency of developing strategy while leveraging advanced technologies for data-driven decision-making.
news.headline: nexAI integrated with Nexxen Data Platform for automated campaign strategy development using generative AI, enhancing audience planning.

news.summary: In Somerville, Massachusetts, Microsoft has announced its partnership with Sublime Systems to decrease construction emissions by purchasing low-carbon cement produced using Sublime's innovative American technology. Microsoft has committed to using up to 622,500 metric tons of Sublime Cement® over a period of six to nine years. The cement will be supplied from Sublime's inaugural commercial plant located in Holyoke, Massachusetts. This decision is part of Microsoft's efforts to enhance its future supply chain sustainability.
news.headline: Microsoft signs long-term purchase contract with Sublime Systems for low-carbon cement, deploying up to 622,500 metric tons over 6-9 years.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) reported its operating results for the first quarter ending May 4, 2025, compared to the same period ending April 28, 2024. The company expressed satisfaction in achieving robust outcomes in Q1 2025, attributed to a favorable top-line comp and consistent profitability. The company's comp surpassed projections at +3.4%, while it outperformed profit forecasts with an operating margin of 16.8% and earnings per share of $1.85.
news.headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. reports Q1 2025 results: +3.4% comp, 16.8% operating margin, $1.85 EPS.

news.summary: A new partnership between Carbon Direct and Microsoft has resulted in the release of criteria for high-quality environmental attribute certificates to speed up the process of decarbonization. This initiative aims to set standards that will ensure the effectiveness and credibility of these certificates. Both parties are dedicated to promoting sustainability and reducing carbon emissions. This collaboration is set to make a significant impact in the environmental sector by providing clear guidelines for the production and verification of these certificates. This move will play a crucial role in advancing decarbonization efforts globally.
news.headline: Carbon Direct and Microsoft announce criteria for environmental attribute certificates to boost decarbonization efforts in the built environment.

news.summary: In Racine, Wisconsin, a new research study by Airedale by Modine, a renowned provider of precision cooling solutions for data centers, revealed a notable trend in public perception towards large-scale infrastructure projects. Contrary to the common "Not In My Backyard" resistance, the study indicated a shift in attitudes among Americans. Surprisingly, 70% of respondents expressed comfort with the idea of having a data center constructed within a short distance from their homes. This data suggests a growing willingness among the public to consider such developments under the condition that developers establish trust with the community.
news.headline: 70% of Americans open to nearby data centers if built responsibly, Airedale survey reveals.
ALPHABET SHARES UP 2% PREMARKET AFTER 2.8% GAIN IN PREVIOUS SESSION
G-7 draft flags increase in international low-value shipments.
G-7 calls for analysis of market concentration, supply chains.
G-7 draft: Economic policy uncertainty has declined from peak.
G-7 draft text pledges to address excessive economic imbalances.

news.summary: Nokia Corporation made an announcement on 22 May 2025 at 16:00 EEST regarding changes in its own shares. A total of 215,846 Nokia shares (NOKIA) were transferred by the company without payment today to participants of Nokia's equity-based incentive plans in line with plan regulations. This transfer was executed based on the Board of Directors' decision to issue company-held shares to fulfill its obligations to plan participants as previously disclosed on 11 November 2024. After this transfer, Nokia Corporation now holds 65,828,924 of its own shares.
news.headline: Nokia transferred 215,846 own shares without consideration to incentive plan participants. Total own shares now 65,828,924.

news.summary: Fartcoin (CRYPTO: FARTCOIN) is at the forefront of the latest surge in meme coins, displaying an impressive 18% increase in just 24 hours. With traders setting their sights on a potential climb to $2 in the short term, the current statistics are as follows: Fartcoin is priced at $1.53 with a market capitalization of $1.53 billion, showing a positive 17.9% trend over the past 24 hours and a 19.1% increase over the last 7 days. In comparison, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.2408 with a market cap of $36 billion, reflecting a 6.2% gain in the last 24 hours and a 5.4% rise over the past 7 days. Similarly, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is valued at $0.00001531 with a market cap of $9.02 billion, having experienced a 5% surge in the last 24 hours and a 0.96% increase over the previous 7 days. Market analysts point to Fartcoin's current trajectory, comparing it to early Bitcoin movements, and anticipate a potential spark in the meme coin market, with projections of hitting new all-time highs. Altcoin Sherpa foresees a promising run ahead. The detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Fartcoin leads meme coin rally, up 18% to $1.53 with a market cap of $1.53 billion. Traders eye $2 next. Dogecoin at $0.2408 with $36 billion market cap. Shiba Inu at $0.00001531 with $9.02 billion market cap. Analysts predict further surges.

KREMLIN HANDS OVER LIST OF 1,000 PRISONERS IT WANTS BACK FROM UKRAINE TO KYIV - REPORTS
Survey shows 75% of renters prefer streamlined, tech-savvy processes, says AppFolio study.

news.summary: In San Diego on May 22, 2025, LPL Financial LLC revealed that Beacon Financial has become a part of LPL Financial’s broker-dealer, Registered Investment Advisor (RIA), and custodial platforms. The move aligns Beacon Financial with Momentum Wealth Partners, an established firm that aids LPL-affiliated advisors. The team from Beacon Financial consists of 10 advisors who collectively managed around $850 million in advisory, brokerage, and retirement plan assets. They made the transition from Cetera to join LPL.
news.headline: LPL Financial and Momentum Wealth Partners gain Beacon Financial team with $850 million in assets from Cetera.

news.summary: Bitcoin surged to a historic peak, reaching close to $112,000 on Wednesday. Progress was noted in the legislation of cryptocurrency bills. Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are poised for significant growth. This significant milestone underscores the rising interest and potential in the crypto market.
news.headline: Bitcoin price hits record high near $112,000 as crypto bills advance; Bitcoin ETFs poised for breakouts.

news.summary: MakeMyTrip's price performance has been on the rise, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 77 to 82. The company is projected to see a substantial increase in profits this year, prompting the rating upgrade.
news.headline: MakeMyTrip projected to see significant profit increase this year with Relative Strength Rating upgrade from 77 to 82.

news.summary: The integration of artificial intelligence is transforming the landscape of cybersecurity, leading to a challenging competition between cyber defenders and advanced attackers. According to a top official at Palo Alto, this shift is fueling a significant arms race in the industry. Investors are advised to monitor these trends closely as they navigate the evolving sector.
news.headline: AI is transforming cybersecurity, creating an arms race between defenders and attackers. Investors should pay attention.

news.summary: Lorne Michaels, known for creating the iconic show "Saturday Night Live" (SNL), began his career as a comedian but quickly transitioned to producing. Over the years, Michaels has consistently pushed boundaries to ensure the show continues to be a success. His innovative approach has helped SNL attract a large audience, with the show boasting impressive viewership numbers. Michaels' dedication to keeping viewers entertained and engaged has been a key factor in the show's enduring popularity.
news.headline: "SNL creator Lorne Michaels, also a comedian turned producer, continues pushing limits to provide laughs."

news.summary: As artificial intelligence gains attention, companies with the top AI technology are seeing significant growth. These AI stocks are either benefiting from revenue or gaining a competitive advantage through this rapidly advancing technology. With the rise of OpenAI consumer devices, there is speculation about potential competition for Apple. This development represents a critical juncture for AI stocks, as investors now look for tangible results in this innovative sector.
news.headline: AI stocks need to prove revenue or strategic edge from AI tech. OpenAI may challenge Apple in consumer market.

news.summary: Shares of Snowflake surged after the company reported impressive first-quarter earnings that exceeded analysts' expectations. The data warehousing company's product revenue guidance for the upcoming June quarter also surpassed estimates. The strong performance was attributed to Snowflake's focus on advancing artificial intelligence technology.
news.headline: Snowflake stock surges on beating Q1 earnings targets and strong guidance, with June quarter product revenue exceeding expectations.

news.summary: Shares of BJ's Wholesale climbed towards a potential buy point from a flat-base, following better-than-expected earnings for the first quarter. While their earnings exceeded expectations, sales fell short. This development positions BJ's Wholesale to possibly reach a buy point.
news.headline: BJ's Wholesale stock approaches buy point after Q1 earnings exceed expectations, despite sales miss.

news.summary: On Thursday, Ralph Lauren exceeded expectations for the fourth quarter. The premium retailer projected growth in sales and expansion in margins despite challenges from tariffs and consumer pressures. The company's positive performance led to a rise in stock prices. Ralph Lauren expects a modest increase in margins going forward.
news.headline: Ralph Lauren beats Q4 views, expects 'modest' margin expansion despite tariffs, consumer pressures.
Colombia Running CBDC Pilot on Cosmos

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Primech AI Pte. Ltd. revealed the successful launch of its autonomous bathroom cleaning robot, HYTRON, at a top lifestyle and shopping hub in Singapore. HYTRON is a cutting-edge robot developed by Primech Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PMEC), the parent company of Primech AI. This deployment marks a major achievement for Primech AI in its objective to transform facility management using innovative robotics and AI solutions.
news.headline: Primech AI leases HYTRON robot at Singapore mall, a part of its mission to revolutionize facility services with AI.

news.summary: XRP price has surged by 4% to $2.43 in the last 24 hours, with open interest also increasing by 25%. Positive market activity suggests a return of investor optimism, with a potential rally to $14 if a bull flag pattern is confirmed. XRP saw gains following Bitcoin hitting new all-time highs above $111,000. Historically, rises in open interest have preceded major price rallies, such as when President Trump directed the creation of a crypto strategic reserve in early March. The XRP/USD pair shows bullish momentum, with a target of $14.50 if a weekly candlestick closes above $2.48. Analysts predict further gains for XRP, with support from moving averages and the relative strength index. The altcoin must flip the all-time high volume-weighted average prices to continue the bullish trend. XRP could potentially reach between $5.24 and $17 by 2025. Trading and investment actions carry risks, and readers should conduct their own research before deciding.
news.headline: XRP futures OI up by 25%, price spikes 4% to $2.43. Bull flag pattern could lead to $14 rally. Positive market sentiment.

news.summary: Informatica, a prominent enterprise specializing in AI-powered cloud data management, was recently acknowledged by Gartner, Inc. as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS). Out of the 16 vendors assessed, Informatica secured a position in the Leaders’ Quadrant based on its excellent Completeness of Vision and strong Ability to Execute. This recognition highlights their competitive edge within the iPaaS market.
news.headline: Informatica named leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for iPaaS, recognized among 16 vendors for completeness of vision and ability to execute.

news.summary: In New York today, Lynq, a real-time yield-bearing settlement network for digital assets, revealed that Fireblocks, an enterprise platform for managing digital asset operations and establishing innovative blockchain businesses, has partnered with Lynq as a launch collaborator. Established in April 2025, Lynq was created through a joint effort by Arca Labs, Tassat Group, and tZERO Group. Fireblocks joins Lynq's expanding consortium of early adopters, which also includes Avalanche and B2C2.
news.headline: Fireblocks partners with Lynq, a real-time yield-bearing settlement network for digital assets. Lynq, launched in April 2025, involves collaboration between Arca Labs, Tassat Group, and tZERO Group. Fireblocks joins as a launch partner along with other early adopters.

news.summary: In the recent update, it has been reported that the country's economy is experiencing a growth rate of 5.2%, which is higher than the projected 4.8%. This growth has been attributed to increased consumer spending and strong numbers in the manufacturing sector. In addition, the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%, against the previous rate of 4.5%. Analysts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further improvements in the overall economic outlook.
news.headline: StorageVault reports outcomes for yearly shareholders' meeting.
Wire Alert: breaks $111k as futures stumble under the weight of rising yields. Wall Street flinches, shrugs...

news.summary: A plan for growth has been established to increase production to potentially 800,000 barrels per year. This will be achieved by maintaining consistent operations and making strategic investments.
news.headline: Sky Quarry plans to reach full production capacity of 800,000 barrels yearly at Foreland Refinery through strategic growth.
